description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a stylized, simplified form. The figure appears to be wearing a long, flowing outer garment, possibly a coat or cape, which drapes over the shoulders and extends down the back. The head is rounded and smooth, with no visible facial features, and the arms are not distinctly modeled, blending into the body. The legs are not clearly separated, giving the lower body a tapered, monolithic appearance. The overall silhouette is angular and geometric, with sharp lines and flat surfaces, suggesting a low-polygon or abstract artistic style. The figure stands upright and is positioned as if moving forward or standing still in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian figure with a long outer garment and a smooth, featureless head, rendered in an angular, geometric style.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the angular, draped garment and the smooth, rounded head, with the body tapering downward.
description_view_1: This angled view shows the back and side of the figure, emphasizing the flowing garment and the lack of distinct arm features.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the full length of the outer garment and the rounded head, with the body appearing monolithic and symmetrical.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the opposite side, again highlighting the angular garment and the smooth transition from head to body.
attribute_clothing_type: long outer garment or coat with a draped, angular style
